settings.sqSetupDesc: Yoo password dagattan gaaffii 3 deebisuun access deebisuu dandeessu. Gaaffii mataa keetii ykn kanneen durtii fayyadamuu dandeessa.

Kuusaa miidiyaa fi deetaa yeroo qulqulleessuu?

Furtuu fi qindaa'inoota icciitii HIN haqaman.
settings.sessionTooYoungForPwChange:
Session password jijjiiruuf yoo xiqqaate guyyoota 7f active ta'uu qaba.

Yeroon hafe: guyyoota {daysLeft}.
settings.waitDaysWarning: Guyyaan 7 hanga ammaatti hin darbine. Mee guyyoota dabalataa {daysLeft} eegaa.
settings.geoDeniedMac:
Geolocation argachuun dhorkame.

1. macOS: Sajoo Sirna → Iccitii → Tajaajila Bakka → browser for enable
2. Browser: mallattoo qulfii barruu teessoo → Bakka → Hayyami jedhu cuqaasaa
3. Fuula sana irra deebi'ii fe'i
settings.geoDeniedOther:
Geolocation argachuun dhorkame.

Mallattoo qulfii barruu teessoo → Bakka → Hayyami keessaa cuqaasi, sana booda fuula irra deebi'ii fe'i

panic.callSettingsNote: Yaadadhu: Haala TCP fi Relay turtii dabaluu danda'u garuu namooma guddaa kennu. Traffic masking SDP sessions irra taaboo random dabaluu.
panic.desc: Kuusaa hunda node kana irra dhabsiisaan ni halamuu. Gocha kana deebisuu hin danda'amu.
panic.warningBody:
Deetaa hunda dhaabbataan balleessuuf jirta.
Gochi kun deebi'uu hin danda'u.
panic.allTracesRemoved: Hordoffiin hundi ni haqame. Kutaan kun xumurameera.

privacy.autoKeySyncHint: Murtii kutaa haaraan argame yeroo — ofumaan meeshaalee keetti hunda ergii (E2E encrypted)
privacy.backupHint: Murtiilee hunda jecha sirrii wajjin banuu fi serveratti kuusi. Meeshaa jijjiiran yeroo — jecha tokkoon deebiisi.
privacy.crossSignHint: Meeshaalee haaraa ofumaan mirkaneessi karaa mallatteessa HMAC (ittisa jijjiiraa)
privacy.federatedHint: Qaxxaamura kuusaa encrypted federation nodes irra faafi (mala Shamir). Server yoo dhabe illee — peers karaan deebiisi.
privacy.historySyncHint: Garagalcha encrypted ergaaleef meeshaalee hunda irra argama. Server sagalee qofa araa
privacy.ktHint: Galmeessa dabalaa qofa jijjiiraa murtii uummata hunda hash chain (Merkle) wajjin. Server galma tokko tokko mallatteessa — sobduu yeroo sahansii argama.
privacy.linkDeviceHint: Murtiilee meeshaa haaraa koodii lakkoofsa 6 karaan geeddari. Murtiilleen ECIES wajjin hidhaman — server dubbisuu hin danda'amu.
privacy.ssssHint: Murtii master-ii N kutaa mala Shamir karaan qoodi. Kutaa M kamiiyyuu murtii deebiisuu danda'a. Kutaan tokko tokko quunnamtii amanamuuf (ECIES) encrypted. Server blobs encrypted qofa araa.
privacy.title: Nageenya dhuunfaa

stream.title: Mata duree
stream.noMediaAccess: Kaameeraa ykn maaykiroofoonii argachuu hin danda'u

contactSync.noMatches: Vortex irratti hanga ammaatti quunnamtiin hin argamne

keyBackup.invalidOrExpiredCode: Koodii sirrii hin taane ykn yeroon isaa darbe
keyBackup.minTwoContacts: Yoo xiqqaate qunnamtii amanamaa 2 fi ulaagaa ≥ 2
keyBackup.noMasterKey: Furtuu guddaa addaan qooduuf hin jiru
keyBackup.passphraseEncryptHint: Icciitiidhaaf jecha dabarsoo galchi. Yaadadhu — isa malee fayyuun hin danda’amu.
keyBackup.passphraseRestoreHint: Gaalee dabarsoo yeroo duwwaa uumtu fayyadamte galchi.
keyBackup.deleteBackupConfirm: Duubdeebii furtuu haquu? Gochi kun kan duubatti hin deebinedha.
keyBackup.revokeSharesConfirm: Aksiyoona ijoo hunda haquu? Karaa quunnamtii amanamoo ta'een deebisuun hin danda'amu ta'a.
keyBackup.splitKeyDesc: Furtuu master kee Shamir scheme fayyadamuun N shares tti qoodama. Aksiyooniin M kamiyyuu furtuu deebisuu ni hayyama. Tokkoon tokkoon qooda quunnamtii amanamaa murtaa'eef icciitii ta'a.
keyBackup.noContactsWithKeys: Furtuuwwan uummataa waliin quunnamtiin hin jiru
keyBackup.minTwoPeers: Yoo xiqqaate hiriyoota sochii qaban 2 kan icciitii barbaachisan
keyBackup.deleteFederatedConfirm: Duubdeebii federeeshinii haquu? Shards peers irratti ni hafu, garuu metadata ni bada.

botConstructor.title: Bot Constructor
botConstructor.subtitle: Build your bot visually — no code needed
botConstructor.welcomeMessage: Welcome message when user starts the bot...
botConstructor.defaultWelcome: Welcome! I am your bot. Use /help to see commands.
botConstructor.docsCommand: Responds when a user sends a specific command (e.g. /help, /start). You can add conversation steps to create multi-step dialogs.
botConstructor.docsMessage: Responds when a user message matches a pattern. Uses regex — e.g. "hello|hi" matches both words. Case-insensitive.
botConstructor.docsWelcome: The first message users see when they start the bot with /start. Every bot should have one.
botConstructor.docsScheduled: Sends a message automatically on a schedule. Great for daily reminders, weekly digests, or periodic announcements.
botConstructor.docsCondition: Branches the bot logic. Check a variable or user input and respond differently based on the result.
botConstructor.docsRandom: Bot picks one response randomly from the list. Perfect for jokes, tips, greetings, or varied responses.
botConstructor.docsApi: Makes an HTTP request to an external API and uses the response in the bot message. Use {data.field} to reference response fields.
botConstructor.docsAdminNotify: Sends a notification to the room admin when triggered. Useful for alerts, new user notifications, or moderation.
botConstructor.docsConversationsDesc: Add steps to a Command block to create interactive dialogs. Each step asks a question, waits for the user answer, and saves it to a variable. Use variables in the final response with {variableName}.
botConstructor.docsVariablesDesc: Use curly braces {variable} in response text to insert dynamic values. State variables persist across messages.
botConstructor.docsBuiltinVars: Built-in variables available in every response:
botConstructor.docsFormattingDesc: You can use HTML-like formatting in responses:
botConstructor.docsTip1: Start with a Welcome block — it is the first thing users see
botConstructor.docsTip2: Add a /help command that lists all available commands
botConstructor.docsTip3: Use conversation steps for registration, surveys, or data collection
botConstructor.docsTip4: Combine Condition blocks with variables for smart branching
botConstructor.docsTip5: Test your bot by talking to it in a room after deploying
